code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Infra_LoadBalancer] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Infra_RedisCache) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Infra_IngressController) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Infra_IngressController) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Infra_LoadBalancer) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Infra_EtcdCluster) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Infra_EtcdCluster) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Infra_WorkerNode) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Infra_RedisCache) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器的状态图，用来描述webhook投递和外部服务调用的容错机制。核心有三个状态：Closed、Open和HalfOpen，它们之间的转换要体现故障检测和恢复的逻辑。
明白，我先确认一下结构。初始状态应该是Closed对吧？然后当失败次数超过阈值时，从Closed跳转到Open。这个失败阈值检测需要关联Redis缓存吗？
对，Closed是初始状态，所有请求都正常通过。失败阈值检测确实要用Infra_RedisCache来记录错误计数。另外成功和失败的请求都要经过IngressController处理，所以这两个自循环都标上它。
好的，我已经把Closed相关的状态和转换都画好了，包括初始入口来自LoadBalancer。现在处理Open状态——超时之后应该进入HalfOpen，这个超时检测还是由LoadBalancer来触发吗？
是的，LoadBalancer负责超时检测。Open状态下如果还有请求尝试，要标记为被EtcdCluster记录。关键是HalfOpen状态的设计：只允许有限的测试请求通过，快速决定是恢复还是再次熔断。
HalfOpen的转换逻辑我梳理一下：测试成功就回到Closed，测试失败则回到Open，等待测试期间保持HalfOpen。成功和失败的测试分别由EtcdCluster和WorkerNode处理，等待状态关联Redis缓存，对吗？
完全正确。最后给每个状态加上右侧注释说明：Closed要强调全流量通过和错误计数；Open要说明阻断请求、返回缓存或错误、以及日志记录；HalfOpen突出有限吞吐和快速决策。
完成！三个状态的注释都已添加，完整呈现了熔断器的工作机制：从LoadBalancer进入Closed正常处理，故障超标经Redis检测后Open熔断，超时后HalfOpen试探，最终由Etcd或WorkerNode的测试结果决定恢复或再次熔断。
